design.narrativeLayer: CFS-012 five-beat arc, endpoint-anchored mapping (post terminal-beat fix)
design.briefComposition: distributive round-robin (semantic) x global (style) x sequential (narrative) — CFS-013

timeline: All 4 segments generated with distinct invariant-composed per-segment prompts
Native in-run stitch failed (first-container ffmpeg cold path) — zero loss: clips already persisted, order already recorded in the sequence manifest
Recovery panel presented the run as a sequence; one-click in-order stitch produced the 48s film

evaluation.method: Operator first-viewing + frame-level review (stills at 0:08, 0:14, 0:29, final segment). Formal independent-evaluator pass (questions a/b/c) remains open.
findings: Complete continuity of narrative, protagonist, settings, and constitutional context across all four independently generated segments

Bearing mark (compass-rose) persisted across three segments in three DIFFERENT material implementations — necklace (seg 2), lapel pin (segs 3-4), wall banner (seg 4) — and was correctly ABSENT from segment 1, whose narrative context was standing/confirmation (octagonal Confirmed seal instead): motif persistence modulated by narrative appropriateness, the style x narrative field behaviour Law XV predicts

Character persistence held at CLASS level (same person, consistent presentation) but not INSTANCE level (facial phenotype and apparent age varied between segments) — the v1 Continuity Block's prose-granularity ceiling; evidence for a dedicated identity-continuity invariant class (CFS-011 backlog)

Content-duration adherence gap: segment 2's spoken content overran its 12s generation window (audio truncates at the 2->3 stitch boundary in an exactly-48s film — stitch preserved durations; composition-layer gap, not a stitch defect)

sequencingControlArm.method: Same clip set stitched in reversed order (DCBA) — maximum-distance perturbation; operator comparative viewing
sequencingControlArm.centralPrediction: CONFIRMED — reversed cut distinctly less coherent (prose flow, narrative assembly) while world, style, and semantic content remain intact: the dissociation signature of inv.constitutional.078
refinements: Temporal correctness is GRADED, not boolean: the reversed film degraded without zeroing — sequencing validity is a coherence field over the space of orderings with the designed sequence as its observed maximum (inv.reasoning.093/.095: sequence is scored, not validated)

Local coherence survives global sequence violation: adjacent original pairs retained pairwise coherence while the global arc broke — relational correctness is pairwise-local, temporal correctness is global (inv.reasoning.094)

Constrained resequencing opened as a legitimate compositional operation: a remix finds another coherent trajectory through the same invariant space — invariants fixed, traversal changed (inv.reasoning.096)

openItems: Formal independent-evaluator pass over both cuts (questions a/b/c)
EXP-002b perturbation mapping (adjacent swaps BACD/ACBD/ABDC vs canonical, DCBA as far anchor) — the temporal coherence field's first contour map
Identity-continuity invariant class ratification (instance-level character persistence)
Duration-adherence clause in per-segment prompts (segment 2 audio overrun)
